zh.Brienne-le-Château,10064,Aube,Grand Est,: 法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gautier Ier de Brienne於1044年12月31日出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，他的父親Engelbert IV de BRIENNE21歲，母親Pétronille de Joigny38歲。他於大約1072年與Eustachie de TONNERRE在法國德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-結婚。他去世於1090年4月23日在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gautier Ier de Brienne于1044年12月31日出生在法国德 艾斯特奧布布利恩勒-a奧时，他的父亲Engelbert IV de BRIENNE21岁，母亲Pétronille de Joigny38岁。他于大约1072年与Eustachie de TONNERRE在法国德 艾斯特奧布巴-素-结婚。他去世于1090年4月23日在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gautier Ier de Brienne was born on 31 December 1044, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, his father, Engelbert IV de BRIENNE, was 21 and his mother, Pétronille de Joigny, was 38. He married Eustachie de TONNERRE about 1072, in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. He died on 23 April 1090, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gautier Ier de Brienne est né le 31 décembre 1044, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Engelbert IV de BRIENNE, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Pétronille de Joigny, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Eustachie de TONNERRE environ 1072, à Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, France. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1090, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gautier Ier de Brienne am 31. Dezember 1044 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Engelbert IV de BRIENNE 21 und seine Mutter Pétronille de Joigny 38. Er hat um 1072 in Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich Eustachie de TONNERRE geheiratet. Er starb am 23. April 1090 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier Ier de Brienne è nato il il 31 dicembre 1044 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Engelbert IV de BRIENNE, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Pétronille de Joigny, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Eustachie de TONNERRE circa 1072, nel Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Morì il 23 aprile 1090, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gautier Ier de Brienneが1044年12月31日にフランスグランド エストアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Engelbert IV de BRIENNEは21歳，母Pétronille de Joignyは38歳であった。約1072年にフランスグランド エストアウベバー-スル-セアインでEustachie de TONNERREと結婚した。彼は1090年4月23日に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gautier Ier de Brienne(이)가 1044년 12월 31일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Engelbert IV de BRIENNE(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Pétronille de Joigny(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1072년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 바-수-세이인에서 Eustachie de TONNERRE(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1090년 4월 23일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.31 DEC 1044–23 APR 1090: 1044 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 31–1090 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23

pt.31 DEC 1044–23 APR 1090: 31 de dezembro de 1044–23 de abril de 1090
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gautier Ier de Brienne nasceu em 31 de dezembro de 1044, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Engelbert IV de BRIENNE, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Pétronille de Joigny, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Eustachie de TONNERRE aproximadamente 1072, em Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, França. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1090, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gautier Ier de Brienne родился 31 декабря 1044 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Engelbert IV de BRIENNE было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Pétronille de Joigny, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustachie de TONNERRE около 1072 г. в местности бар-сур-син, ауб, гранд эст, Франция. Он умер 23 апреля 1090 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.31 DEC 1044–23 APR 1090: 31 de diciembre de 1044–23 de abril de 1090
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gautier Ier de Brienne nació el 31 de diciembre de 1044, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Engelbert IV de BRIENNE, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Pétronille de Joigny, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Eustachie de TONNERRE aproximadamente 1072, en Bar-sur-Seine, Aube, Grand Est, Francia. Murió el 23 de abril de 1090, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
